route: ir_svg (deterministic stdlib IR->SVG vector render; no AutoCAD needed)
note: Real before/after/overlay SVG render the EXTRACTED IR geometry (so it verifies extraction+patch directly); the +1 patched LINE is highlighted in the overlay. accoreconsole raster plot remains not_implemented on this host (EXPORTPDF unknown / -PLOT locale) — the ir_svg route supersedes it for verification.
